screen_state.body_text: You walk into a room to find a large hole in the ground. As you approach the hole, an enormous serpent creature appears from within.   "Ho hooo! Hello hello! what have we got here? Hello adventurer, I ask a simple question.  The most fulfilling of lives is that in which you can buy anything!  Do you agree?"
"Yeeeeeeessssssssssessss!  Thisss will all be worthhh it.  ..ssSSs..... ss... sssss....!"
The serpent rears its head and blasts a stream of gold upwards!  It is amazing and terrifying simultaneously.  You gather all the gold, thank the snake, and get going.
